context: Evaluates correct use of crypto-browserify's createECDH for elliptic curve key exchange. The solution must call generateKeys() to create a key pair and computeSecret() with the other party's public key.

checklist.name: Uses createECDH
checklist.description: The solution calls createECDH(curve) from crypto-browserify to create an ECDH instance, passing the named curve string.

checklist.name: Calls generateKeys()
checklist.description: The solution calls ecdh.generateKeys() to generate the key pair, making the public and private key available.

checklist.name: Calls computeSecret()
checklist.description: The solution calls ecdh.computeSecret(otherPublicKey) to compute the shared secret from the other party's public key.

checklist.name: Retrieves public key
checklist.description: The solution calls ecdh.getPublicKey() to obtain the public key Buffer to share with the other party.

checklist.name: Shared secret matches
checklist.description: Both Alice's and Bob's computed shared secrets are equal Buffers (verified by Buffer.equals or toString comparison).
